_comment: Category-prefix naming registry for bitranox-skills. Skill names are <category>-[<sub>-]<name> (two segments max before the name; lowercase + hyphen). repo-gate.py enforces that every NEW skill's top-level prefix is a key in 'categories' (sub-prefixes are free-form). 'legacy' grandfathers the current flat names until a future retrofit MAJOR; 'retrofit' is the ready worklist for that rename. See CONTRIBUTING.md 'Skill naming'.

coding.desc: Language/runtime-specific craft: architecture, references, idioms, libraries, packaging, perf, tooling bound to one language

web.desc: Web app development: frontend UI, backend services, HTTP APIs, fullstack

data.desc: Data engineering and analytics: pipelines, ETL, dataframes, analysis, visualization

ai.desc: ML/AI/LLM systems: model building, prompting, agents, RAG, LLM APIs

devops.desc: CI/CD, build and release automation, observability (provider-agnostic)

containers.desc: Container runtime and orchestration regardless of host

net.desc: Networking: DNS, routing, proxies, firewall, VPN, reverse proxy

sec.desc: Security posture: appsec, auth, secrets, pentest, privacy/PII

test.desc: Testing/QA tooling and frameworks (the concrete how, not the discipline)

docs.desc: Technical writing and doc generation, markdown authoring/conversion

files.desc: Programmatic create/edit/validate of machine-readable file formats

git.desc: Version-control workflows: branching, worktrees, gitignore, history

compuse.desc: Computer-use mechanics: running shell/git/ssh commands, reading exit codes/output, remote control

process.desc: Software-engineering workflow discipline: plan, review, debug, agent orchestration, ship

pm.desc: Project/product/program management: agile, roadmaps, task workflows

office.desc: Business documents and personal productivity: docx/xlsx/pptx/pdf, email, calendar, notes

write.desc: General prose/content craft and editing, style, humanizing

biz.desc: Business/finance/ops beyond marketing: finance, sales, legal, strategy

design.desc: Visual and UX design craft (not frontend implementation): UX, UI, branding visuals, theming

comms.desc: Targeted interpersonal/organizational messaging: status updates, chat, meetings

research.desc: Research and investigation: web research, literature review, fact-checking, citations

meta.desc: Authoring the marketplace itself: writing/adopting skills, self-improvement, harness/hooks config
